operating_ranges.evidence: Recipe steps show timer values ranging from 000:00:30 to 000:30:00
Boat to 10.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min and Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min
Zone1 425.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min Zone2 425.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min Zone3 425.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min

fault_conditions.name: dangerous_situation_detected
fault_conditions.description: Manual abort required if operator foresees dangerous situation
fault_conditions.symptoms: Process recipe needs to be reset to Step 0
fault_conditions.evidence: A manual 'Abort' instruction may be required if the operator foresees a dangerous situation

fault_conditions.name: continuous_loop_fault
fault_conditions.description: Continuous looped process recipe needs reset
fault_conditions.symptoms: Process stuck in loop, cannot select another recipe
fault_conditions.evidence: continuous looped process recipe needs to be reset to Step 0 to allow selection of another process recipe

maintenance_actions.name: stop_process_recipe
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Stops timer while maintaining all given commands
maintenance_actions.evidence: When activated, the 'Stop' command will stop the timer while all given commands are maintained

maintenance_actions.name: abort_process_recipe
maintenance_actions.evidence: continuous looped process recipe needs to be reset to Step 0 to allow selection of another process recipe

maintenance_actions.name: start_continue_process_recipe
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Starts from Step 0 or continues from stopped state
maintenance_actions.evidence: starting a newly selected process recipe so it starts running from Step 0 or starting a process recipe that has been stopped or is waiting for an 'Operator' instruction

assumptions.statement: Process controller manages sequential recipe execution with safety interlocks
assumptions.reason: Manual shows detailed recipe steps with safety checks, operator confirmations, and abort capabilities

assumptions.statement: Controller maintains state during stop operations
assumptions.reason: Stop command stops timer while all given commands are maintained
